inlineContent.text: VigramSDK is a library to connect your app to viDoc to retrieve location data and perform laser distance recordings.

is distributed through CocoaPods and Swift Package Manager.
You can integrate VigramSDK into your app by using the following line in your
Use the optional RxSwift subspec only when your app needs RxSwift:
The default
installation exposes the Combine-compatible SDK API and does not pull RxSwift.

and
The optional RxSwift subspec adds small bridge helpers on top of the public Combine publishers:

in Xcode and select exact version
Use the
product for the core Combine-compatible SDK.
The local Xcode project also exposes
for framework builds
that need RxSwift bridge helpers.
The root Swift package does not include the RxSwift bridge so applications that
do not use RxSwift do not resolve or download the
dependency.
